name: Squash Foo Young with Dried Tomato Sauce
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup low-fat reduced sodium chicken broth
recipeInstructions:
1. Rehydrate Frieda's dried tomatoes according to package directions.
2. In a medium bowl, beat egg whites and yolk until frothy. Add the cooked Spaghetti Squash, broccoli, carrot, red pepper, herbs, and black pepper. Set aside.
3. For sauce, place all sauce ingredients (last 6 listed) in a blender or food processor. Cover and process until pureed. Spoon into a saucepan; warm over low heat until heated through.
4. To cook pancakes, spray a nonstick skillet with aerosol cooking spray. Drop batter, 1/4 cup at a time, into the skillet. Cook over medium heat until browned; turn and cook until set. Place on a heated platter and keep warm until all are cooked. Serve topped with the sauce.
5. You may use 1 teaspoon dried herbs instead of fresh herbs.
